name: Jigsaw Industry
short_description: Jigsaw Industry is a game that allows you to unleash your creativity and fully enjoy the fun of thinking. Design your own factory to combine and process different shapes and colors. A fully automated and intelligent factory can be achieved through digital circuits, logic signals, and other means.
detailed_description:
Jigsaw Industry is a game that allows you to unleash your creativity and fully enjoy the fun of thinking. Design your own factory to combine and process different shapes and colors. A fully automated and intelligent factory can be achieved through digital circuits, logic signals, and other means.

You can perform basic cutting, combining, coloring, and color matching operations on graphics by arranging various facilities in an orderly manner,

You can perform various intelligent operations by connecting digital logic signals to achieve fully automatic intelligent puzzle solving

You can write your own signal processing components using Lua programming language to achieve custom signal processing
about_the_game:

You can perform basic cutting, combining, coloring, and color matching operations on graphics by arranging various facilities in an orderly manner,

You can perform various intelligent operations by connecting digital logic signals to achieve fully automatic intelligent puzzle solving

You can write your own signal processing components using Lua programming language to achieve custom signal processing
supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil
